channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The IRA Penalizes Many of the Most Effective Cancer Drugs
item.description: In oncology, FDA approval often marks only the first step.

item.title: The Hidden Property Tax You Have Never Heard Of
item.description: Aggressive escheatment is cheating stock market investors.

item.title: California's DEI Bloat Conflicts with Newsom's Shift to Normal
item.description: For the California governor with presidential ambitions, change should begin at home.

item.title: The Episode Where the Kardashians Save the World
item.description: A surrogacy lesson from an unlikely source that deserves attention.
